---
title: "Griffin Shelor"
image: media/GShelorMountRose.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:griffinshelor@gmail.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/gshelor
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/griffinshelor/
    # - icon: briefcase
    #   text: UNR Profile
    #   href: https://www.unr.edu/geography/people/griffin-shelor 
---

Welcome to my website! Feel free to read [about me](about/index.qmd) and my [research and previous work](projects.qmd)!
